CheckTitle: Check if E2E Networks nodes have accidental protection enabled
Description: This check verifies that E2E Networks nodes have accidental protection enabled to guard against unintended deletion or modification of compute instances.
Risk: Nodes without accidental protection are easier to delete or modify unintentionally, increasing the risk of service disruption and unplanned exposure of compute resources.

Recommendation.Text: Enable accidental protection on nodes to prevent unintended deletion or modification.
